heading: Repealed. ,Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 5370A Stat. 641
label: 961 to 967 Repealed. ,Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 5370A Stat. 641
notes: Section 961, acts , pt. II, § 233, ; –(g), , related to liability of members for active duty, limitation on recall, annual training, voluntary active duty, notification prior to active-duty orders, utilization of officers, protection of members of organized units, and to ministers of religion. Section 962, , pt. II, § 234, , related to active duty in connection with Reserve training and administration. See sections 12301 and 12310 of Title 10.act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 490

Section 963, , pt. II, § 235, , provided for active duty agreements, involuntary release, obligation to serve full term, prior obligated or involuntary service, uniformity of agreements. See sections 12311 and 12312 of Title 10.act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 491
Section 964, , pt. II, § 236, , provided for continuation of active duty. See .act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 491section 12311 of Title 10

Section 966, , pt. II, § 238, , related to maintenance of Reserve forces in time of partial mobilization. See .act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 492section 10207 of Title 10
Section 967, , pt. II, § 239, , provided for release from active duty. See .act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 492section 12313 of Title 10
